summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN (Part Serial Number) associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date - latest date only for each APU

transformations: Join rotables table to rotables_trend table on psn field
Join rotables table to aircraft table on ac_registr field
Filter rotables_trend to include only the latest ref_date for each unique PSN
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs of type B737NG with their current CT5ATP health status
Each APU appears only once with its most recent trend data
All required fields are populated including partno, serialno, psn, aircraft registration, and CT5ATP value
Workorder reference is included when available
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query can be switched from AMOS Acceptance to AMOS Production upon go-live
